hero.title: You retried the same prompt 5 times yesterday.
hero.subtitle: You vibe code every day — but you can't see your own patterns. The error loops. The wasted prompts. The skills you're not building. VibeMon tracks it all, so you actually get better.
hero.trustMeta: Free beta · Cursor · VS Code · Claude Code

howItWorks.title: Code with AI. We handle the rest.
howItWorks.subtitle: VibeMon runs quietly in the background. You code — it learns, tracks, and coaches.

steps.title: Open your editor. Done.
steps.desc: Cursor, VS Code, Claude Code — VibeMon auto-detects your session. No setup, no plugins, no friction.

steps.title: See your invisible habits
steps.desc: How many prompts worked? Where did you loop? Which tool saved time? VibeMon turns your sessions into a story you can learn from.

steps.title: Level up for real
steps.desc: Earn XP, unlock skills, track your streak. Weekly reports show exactly where you improved — with data, not vibes.

features.title: Everything you need to stop guessing and start growing.
features.subtitle: Most vibe coders have no idea if they're getting better. VibeMon fixes that.

cards.title: Session Tracker
cards.desc: Every coding session logged automatically. Prompts, wins, errors, duration — all captured without you lifting a finger.
bullets: Catch error loops before they eat your day

cards.title: Skill Tree & XP
cards.desc: 16 real vibe coding skills across 4 tiers. From prompt clarity to AI architecture — tracked with XP, not opinions.
bullets: Level up by shipping, not watching
See exactly what to learn next

cards.title: AI Cat Coach
cards.desc: Not a generic chatbot. Your cat has seen every session, every mistake, every win. Its advice is personal.
bullets: "Why did I get stuck?" — answered instantly

cards.title: Weekly Insights
cards.desc: Success rate, cost per session, error patterns, streaks — the numbers that show if you're actually improving.

midCTA.title: Sounds like you?
midCTA.subtitle: Join 1,504+ vibe coders already tracking their progress.

items.name: Minh T.
items.role: 13 years old · learning to build products
items.quote: I'm only 13 and I didn't know anything about coding. VibeMon showed me where I keep making the same mistakes, and now I can fix them myself. So fun!

items.name: Sarah K.
items.quote: I had no idea I was spending 40% of my time on prompts that never worked. Seeing that number made me change my whole approach.

items.name: Alex R.
items.quote: The cat coach told me to switch from Cursor to Claude Code for auth — solved it in 1 prompt instead of 6. That one tip saved me hours.

skillTree.title: 16 skills. 4 tiers. Zero guessing.
skillTree.subtitle: Finally know exactly where you stand — and what to work on next.

meetYourPet.title: 8 friends. Each with their own personality.
meetYourPet.body: Every character in VibeMon has their own story, personality, and way of helping you learn. They live in the DevRealm — a digital universe inside every computer — and they're waiting for you to join the crew.
meetYourPet.growthNote: Each pet evolves as your skills grow

characters.name: Byte
characters.quote: I've been here longer than the logs remember.
characters.role: Your main companion. Reacts to all your coding activity in real-time.

characters.name: Nova
characters.quote: I know 17 ways. Let's start with the weirdest.
characters.role: Your primary tutor. Appears during lessons with deep explanations.

characters.name: Sage
characters.quote: There is no shortcut. Only the path.
characters.role: Hosts deep-dive learning paths and provides lore entries.

characters.name: Glitch
characters.quote: Rules are suggestions the compiler hasn't rejected yet.
characters.role: Appears when you hit errors. Frames bugs as features.

characters.name: Crash
characters.quote: Ship it. Fix it. Ship it again.
characters.role: Speed build events and hackathon mode. Celebrates every ship.

characters.name: Zero
characters.quote: The fastest code is code that doesn't run.
characters.role: Appears when code is inefficient. Silent refactor nudges.

characters.name: Luna
characters.quote: No idea what I'm doing. Shipped 7 things this month.
characters.role: Peer companion. Co-builds in collaborative challenges.

characters.name: Null
characters.role: Random event character. Appears unexpectedly with secret content.

finalCTA.title: Stop guessing.
finalCTA.subtitle: 1,504+ builders already tracking their patterns. Beta closes when spots fill up.
finalCTA.trustMeta: Free beta · No credit card · Cancel anytime

mockup.lessonText: Tell AI your tools before asking for code
